name: complaint-8d-report
tagline: Generate standard 8D reports from complaint data with D1–D8 template and fill-in guidance
description: Generates full 8D (Eight Disciplines) report skeletons for customer complaints and quality deviations. Supports creating from scratch or completing from existing information. Includes: basic info table, D1 form the team, D2 problem description (5W2H), D3 interim containment, D4 root cause analysis, D5 permanent corrective actions and verification, D6 implement and validate, D7 prevent recurrence, D8 close and congratulate. Provides fill-in hints and placeholders per discipline; output is Markdown for pasting into Word, Excel, or internal systems.
author: OpenClaw Skills
